x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Allocation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Assigning collateral for obligations, such as loans, derivatives, or secured transactions.

Comment:
Example: 40 shares of a stock allocated as collateral for a derivative contract.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reserve Allocation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Assigning specific trading strategies, portfolios, or internal accounting purposes.

Comment:
Example: 500 bonds allocated to a fixed-income trading desk portfolio.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Hedged Allocation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Assigning a short position or derivative exposure is backed by a specific asset to cover potential obligations.

Comment:
Example: A short equity position covered by cash or related shares.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Custom Allocation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Any allocation defined by institution-specific rules, contractual obligations, or regulatory requirements.

Comment:
Example: A portion of cash reserved for tax obligations.
